label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: BARGUIL Romain attacked from 18-rider breakaway over Pico Villuercas 20%+ ramps, held solo through final 6.2km after Navarro/Van Moer collision eliminated chase.
tactical_patterns: BARGUIL shed CHAPPUIS on final climb despite working for him, prioritizing stage over team hierarchy when opportunity arose.
NAVARRO collision with VAN MOER on technical descent eliminated strongest breakaway chasers, opening path for solo BARGUIL win.
LOPEZ Miguel Angel tested ROGLIC 20km from finish but ROGLIC counterattacked at line, showing aggressive defense signals GC confidence.
VINE Jay recovered from crash/possible abandonment to finish third, revealing exceptional recovery capacity under extreme duress.

rider_signals.BARGUIL Romain: positive: DSM transfer proving tactically correct, now hunting KOM aggressively after stage win establishes 19-point lead over Caruso
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: third place after mid-stage crash/potential abandonment shows unusual resilience that handicappers typically miss in recovery scenarios
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: neutral: attacked ROGLIC but unable to sustain gap, confirming domestique role rather than genuine GC threat despite positioning
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: counterattacked Lopez at line rather than marking, revealing willingness to gain bonus seconds despite controlling race
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: negative: conceded 2 seconds to MARTIN despite no attacks, suggesting passive defense strategy may crack under sustained pressure
